license.title: License & Usage
license.desc: Legal terms regarding the Oxide source code and distribution.
license.msrsl_desc: The source code is provided for reference purposes only. You may view and study the code, but distribution, modification, or commercial use is strictly prohibited without explicit O.A.S. authorization. Any violation will result in legal action.

hero.title: The Terminal-First IDE.
hero.subtitle: Built for those who live in the console. Oxide merges terminal power with a blazingly fast modern Rust interface.

footer.tagline: Terminal-first developer workspace. High performance, pure glass.

bento.native_desc: Broadcast commands to multiple terminals simultaneously via a high-performance Rust backend.
bento.glass_desc: Integrated visual gauge and hardware-accelerated rendering.
bento.minimal_desc: A refined, distraction-free interface that stays out of your way.
bento.future_desc: Instant file discovery powered by LSM Sled storage and SQLite.
bento.undo_desc: Safe file operations with a robust undo/redo system.
bento.zoom_desc: Infinite canvas-style zoom to focus or overview your workspace.
bento.shortcuts_desc: Comprehensive keyboard mapping for ultra-fast navigation.
bento.watcher_desc: Real-time filesystem sync with advanced debounce and filtering.

tech.title: Built on Open Standards.
tech.subtitle: Engineered from the ground up for stability.
